title: Tick Control in Merrick, NY | Professional Tick Extermination $125-$325

intro: Merrick's beautiful tree-lined streets and proximity to Norman J. Levy Park & Preserve create the perfect environment for ticks to thrive. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick control services throughout Merrick, protecting families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our proven treatments create a protective barrier around your property, targeting tick hotspots in yards, gardens, and wooded areas.
whyUs: Our tick control specialists understand Merrick's unique landscape, from waterfront properties along the canals to the wooded residential neighborhoods near Merrick Road. We use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while providing maximum protection against deer ticks, dog ticks, and other species common to Long Island.
localContext: Merrick residents enjoy close proximity to parks like Fraser Park and Cammann's Pond Park, where outdoor activities increase tick exposure risk. The area's mature trees, lush landscaping, and proximity to natural preserves make professional tick control essential for homeowners throughout the 11566 zip code.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Merrick, NY?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Merrick typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May through August. However, mild Long Island winters can keep ticks active year-round, making ongoing prevention important for Merrick homeowners.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Merrick range from $125 to $325 depending on property size and treatment frequency. We offer seasonal packages and one-time treatments to fit your needs and budget while providing comprehensive protection for your yard.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for my pets and children in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians are trained to target areas where ticks live while minimizing exposure to treated areas. Pets and children can typically return to treated areas within 2-4 hours after application.

faqs.question: What areas of my Merrick property will you treat for ticks?
faqs.answer: We focus on tick harborage areas including lawn perimeters, wooded edges, shrub beds, tall grasses, stone walls, and areas where your yard meets natural vegetation. For Merrick properties near parks or waterways, we pay special attention to transition zones where ticks are most likely to wait for hosts.
